title: The lurid fascination of the school shooter film
description: As We Need To Talk About Kevin turns 15 and audiences still argue over The Drama, an assessment of a North American cultural phenomenon.
hook: Why do we keep making films about school shooters, and why do we argue about them so fiercely? A reckoning with a peculiarly North American obsession.

title: Weike Wang on Recurring Dreams and Loneliness
description: The author discusses her story “The Dreamdrive.”
hook: A writer excavates the strange logic of recurring dreams and what they reveal about desire, memory, and being fundamentally alone.

title: Why Michael Che and Colin Jost Said All Those Awful Things
description: The “Weekend Update” joke swap is a celebration of friendship, bad taste, and the importance of context.
hook: The joke swap isn't crude humor—it's a masterclass in how context, trust, and friendship transform what's unsayable into what's necessary.
